mlb.headline: Zack Wheeler pitches Phillies to 3-0 victory that stops 7-game win streak for Guardians
mlb.summary: — Zack Wheeler pitched six shutout innings and Bryson Stott hit a two-run single as the Philadelphia Phillies defeated Cleveland 3-0 on Saturday, ending the Guardians' seven-game winning streak.

mlb.headline: Nationals P Irvin goes 5 innings, exits with shoulder injury
mlb.summary: Washington right-hander Jake Irvin pitched five hitless innings for his first win in nearly two months, a 2-0 victory over Atlanta, but he felt a bit of tightness on his final few pitches in the fifth

mlb.headline: Kolek throws complete-game shutout and Royals top Mariners to end 4-game skid
mlb.summary: — Stephen Kolek threw a complete-game shutout and Carter Jensen had two RBI and the Kansas City Royals shut out the Seattle Mariners 5-0 on Saturday to end a four-game losing streak.

nhl.headline: Latvia hands U.S. its third loss at ice hockey worlds
nhl.summary: Sandis Vilmanis scored two empty-net goals to help Latvia upset the United States 4-2 for the defending champion's third loss at the ice hockey world championship.

nba.headline: Taylor Swift, Travis Kelce lead NBA playoffs celebrity sightings
nba.summary: Celebrities have been out in style courtside at the NBA playoffs.

nba.headline: Thunder rule out Ajay Mitchell for Game 4 with calf strain
nba.summary: Thunder guard Ajay Mitchell has been ruled out of Sunday's Game 4 of the Western Conference finals because of a right calf strain.

nba.headline: Spurs guards Fox, Harper to play in Game 4, Johnson says
nba.summary: Injured Spurs guards De'Aaron Fox and Dylan Harper are both expected to play Sunday in Game 4 of the Western Conference finals, coach Mitch Johnson said.

tennis.headline: French Open 2026: How to watch in the UK, schedule, prize money, Brit watch
tennis.summary: Find out all you need to know about the 2026 French Open in the UK, with dates, TV information, prize money and more.

tennis.headline: French Open prize money won't change this year, Mauresmo says
tennis.summary: The French Open will not adjust its prize money pool this year despite player complaints about their share of the major's revenue, tournament director Amelie Mauresmo said.
